north_star_defined.q: Is there one north-star metric for the current company stage?

funnel_mapped_to_routes.q: Are key routes mapped to funnel steps (visit, signup, activation)?

events_named.q: Is there a consistent event taxonomy (snake_case, past tense)?

analytics_connected_or_manual.q: Is GA4 connected OR manual_kpis populated for core metrics?

weekly_review_scheduled.q: Is there a weekly review template with owners and thresholds?
